title: RevenueCat
html:
RevenueCat

Subscription / in-app-purchase backend used in Brotein's paywall — the commercial spine of Brotein's monetization. Cross-listed in the late-July 2025 roadmap (tabs screenshot) as one of the headline integration tabs alongside DeHardcoding API Keys, TikTok marketing, and Safe APIKEYS.

Chronology — the late-July 2025 setup sprint

  • 2025-07-21 — Roadmap tabs include "RevenueCat" as a headline tab — Yahir scopes the integration
  • 2025-07-27 — 2025 07 27 screenshot 2025 07 27 at 2 02 52 pm 11e3a138 + 2025 07 27 screenshot 2025 07 27 at 7 35 21 pm afce00b1 — sets up BroteinOfficialPaywall project, uploads App Store Connect subscription P8 key (initial filename-prefix validation error, fixed to SubscriptionKey_XXX.p8 format)
  • 2025-07-28 — 2025 07 28 screenshot 2025 07 28 at 5 33 24 pm 6b0f7b63 — RevenueCat dashboard wiring continues
  • 2025-07-31 — 2025 07 31 screenshot 2025 07 31 at 1 10 13 pm 6d214010, 2025 07 31 screenshot 2025 07 31 at 2 30 01 pm c5477bb4, 2025 07 31 screenshot 2025 07 31 at 4 33 48 pm 3c7a2d7b, 2025 07 31 screenshot 2025 07 31 at 4 39 58 pm e053624c — full-day push, multiple captures
  • 2025-08-21 — 2025 08 21 screenshot 2025 08 21 at 1 40 05 pm 1b34ab7e, 2025 08 21 screenshot 2025 08 21 at 1 40 11 pm 1f9ff66d, 2025 08 21 screenshot 2025 08 21 at 1 49 46 pm 0e81c1f8, 2025 08 21 screenshot 2025 08 21 at 1 49 55 pm 288dc231 — entitlements verification (Brotein Premium Monthly + Yearly)

What it does in the stack

Tracks Brotein Premium Monthly + Yearly entitlements. Sits between Brotein's SwiftUI client and App Store Connect — handles receipt validation, restore-purchases, lifetime-value tracking, churn signals. Pairs with the 3 day trial → $7.99/mo or $47.99/yr pattern Yahir locked in as the default Brotein monetization shape.
